message: ci: clone tachikoma for dependent builds

files.patch:
@@ -26,6 +26,13 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
+      - name: Checkout Tachikoma subrepo

+          repository: steipete/Tachikoma
+          ref: main
+          path: Tachikoma
+
       - name: Cache SwiftPM (PeekabooCore)
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
